title: Wake Me Up When September Ends
why_this_song: Wake Me Up When September Ends by Green Day (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Wake me up when September ends"

Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Wake me up when September ends"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "The innocent can never last"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Summer has come and passed"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Seven years has gone so fast
Wake me up when September ends

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wake" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wake" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "september" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "september" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But never forgets what I lost

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Wake Me Up When September Ends" was released in 2004. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Wake Me Up When September Ends" foi lançada em 2004. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Wake Me Up When September Ends" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Wake Me Up When September Ends" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
